message:
feat(freeze): Convert regexp opcode to Zig

regexp opcode creates RegExp objects from pattern and flags.

Stack effect: [pattern, flags] -> [regexp]

Implementation:
- Pops pattern and flags from stack
- Gets global RegExp constructor
- Calls constructor with pattern and flags
- Pushes resulting RegExp object

Zig-specific changes:
- POP via block expressions for pattern/flags
- var args = [2]qjs.JSValue{ pattern, flags } for array
- &args for pointer to array in CallConstructor
- qjs. prefix for all QuickJS functions
- JS_IsException check: != 0 for Zig (returns c_int)
- Return early on exception instead of break/next_block

This enables RegExp literal support in frozen functions.
